# !=(_:_:)

**Operator**

Compares two connection states and returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/swift/true] if they're different.

## Declaration

```swift
static func != (lhs: PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.State, rhs: PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.State) -> Bool
```
